Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on THU-SEP-26-2013:
CHRISTINA CIUMAC, plaintiff appears in propria persona;
Christine Y. Lee, Esq. of Toschi, Sidran, Collins & Doyle [510.835.3400] appears for defendant GERMAN MOTORS COLLISION, LLC

HEARING - R U L I N G: Defendant GERMAN MOTORS COLLISION LLC'S Motion to Compel Further Reponses to Form Interrogatories, Sets One and Two is denied in part and granted in part. Defendant's requests for sanctions are awarded in the amount of $900. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: James V. Weixel; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
